title: The Plan to Strike Big Mom
description: On pages 6–9, this part focuses on Reiju, Perospero, Jinbe, Sanji, Big Mom as Sanji chooses to return to Luffy, and the assassination plot against Big Mom begins taking shape.
scene: Sanji and Luffy reunite emotionally, turning the rescue mission into a direct conspiracy against Big Mom.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: doesn't matter. You love having a blast till late anyway, right?

dialogue.text: I should be allowed to have them change my room if I wish, no?

dialogue.speaker: Reiju
dialogue.text: Sanji hasn't run away, has he?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The bride and groom are both getting ready as we speak!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Quit Interferin' in the business of an adult, idiot.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Let's go. Apparently they're holding the ceremony on the roof.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What are you going to do, Sanji?! You know full well what will happen now!

dialogue.text: It's time for Mama's tea party!,5

dialogue.text: Will they make it in time?

dialogue.text: The Princess of the Pleasure Quarter

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Why the hell are you here, you mortician?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: You're a nitpicky man, you are! Shush!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Are morticians not allowed to celebrate weddings?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You're the last person I want telling me that, du field!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This marriage is big news! The germa and my company go way back!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: My, my, I'm so glad to have been invited for all this! :)

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: President of the world economic times "Big News" MORE GANS

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But this news is well known in the underworld! It's quite old!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Indeed indeed indeed indeed indeed indeed indeed indeed indeed! No need to ship this news! ♥

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: emperors of the underworld! We might be a bit late if we try to go through the castle.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: No matter how many times I see it, this candywork

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Let us hurry. You three are the last guests!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: 00! The stairs move on their own!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: In three minutes, you can lick the candy coaster too!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Open the gates! I won't submit to the body check!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I received an invitation for the last party, too, but...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: I HAD TO ATTEND MY MOTHER'S FUNERAL!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And that's what I wrote in my letter back to big mom! And do you know what she sent me?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This is how the exchange would have went.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: "And do you know what she sent me?!"

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: "The head of my father, who should have been in the hospital!"

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And two of your subordinates would have been shot dead.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Oi! Who the hell shot him?! That's a guest, damn it!

summary: This section advances the Whole Cake Island — Sanji Returns storyline with 68 dialogue beats. Sanji chooses to return to Luffy, and the crew joins Bege’s risky plan to attack Big Mom during the tea party.
